ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department or block the employee belongs to */,
  "emp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "emp_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "emp_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the organization */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (full-time, part-time, contractor, etc.) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department or block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the department or block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the department or block */,
  "parent_block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department or block (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (junior, senior, manager, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role ended (if applicable) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Is this the primary role for the employee? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (health, financial, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit assigned to the employee */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  "is_dependent" INTEGER /* Is this benefit for a dependent? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee submitting the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time-off period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time-off period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the time-off request */,
  "num_days" INTEGER /* Number of days requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "eval_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "eval_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee attending the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was attended */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training */,
  "training_description" TEXT /* Description of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary_date" TEXT /* Date the salary was effective */,
  "salary_amount" TEXT /* Salary amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date the payroll was processed */,
  "payroll_amount" TEXT /* Payroll amount */,
  "payroll_status" TEXT /* Status of the payroll (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)
